prediction.summary: Multiple failed SSH login attempts were observed originating from IP address 203.0.113.45. The attacker attempted to log in as 11 different users (alice through kate) within a 30-second window, indicating a potential password spraying or brute-force attack against the SSH service. The connection was subsequently closed.

recommendations: Immediately block the source IP address 203.0.113.45 at the firewall.
Review SSH server logs for any successful logins from 203.0.113.45 or other suspicious IPs around the time of the attack.
Verify that account lockout policies are properly configured and enforced on the SSH server to prevent future brute-force attempts.
Implement or strengthen rate-limiting for SSH connection attempts to mitigate similar attacks.
Ensure all user accounts have strong, unique passwords and consider enabling multi-factor authentication (MFA) for SSH access.
